changes: Full-width layout: content area uses full browser width
Fix library media browser for existing caches
Security: eliminate all command injection vulnerabilities (execSync → execFileSync)
Security: config files written with restrictive permissions (0o600)
Performance: async ffprobe calls (non-blocking library scans)
Performance: TMDB cache with size limit (2000 entries)
Reliability: config JSON parse fallback on corruption
Build: extracted bundle_binary() function, fixed subshell bug
Library Media Browser: browse all movies and series with TMDB posters, ratings, and metadata
Media grouping: TV shows grouped by series with expandable episode lists
Search and filter media by title, type (movies/series)
Settings restructured: Media tab combines directories, Plex, and subtitles
Settings restructured: Schedule tab combines daily conversion and folder watch
Sidebar reordered: Library promoted to second position
Shared TMDB module for consistent metadata across conversion and library
msmtp bundled in macOS app — no separate brew install needed
Full architecture refactor: server.js split into lib/ modules + routes/ routers
Frontend refactor: CSS extracted to public/css/style.css, JS split into 7 files
Folder Watch: realtime MKV detection with chokidar, stability check, auto-queue
Plex Refresh: automatic library refresh after conversion with test connection
Library Overview: media stats dashboard with SVG donut charts and bar charts
Subtitle Fetch: automatic .srt download via OpenSubtitles API with language selection
TMDB ID added to report JSON for subtitle matching
Post-conversion hooks: subtitles → plex refresh pipeline
Fix HandBrakeCLI crash: bundle all transitive dylib dependencies (libglib, libgraphite2, libpng, libintl, libXau, libXdmcp, libpcre2)
Recursive dylib resolution in build script (28 → 35 dylibs)
Click on failed items to see error details in a popup
Failure reasons captured from HandBrake log
Bash script marks reports as emailed after direct send (prevents duplicate emails)
Custom styled confirm dialogs replace native browser dialogs
Email cron only sends new reports (skips already-emailed and empty reports)
Show '✓ Sent' badge on reports that have been emailed
Manual resend also marks report as sent
Fix report resend: modal close was clearing filename before sending request
Admin email notification when someone downloads a file (device, IP, file info)
Download notification settings: admin email + toggle in Settings
Fix manual report resend 'Invalid filename' error
Bundled HandBrakeCLI inside the app — no separate brew install needed
About tab in Settings: open source credits and Claude attribution
Download links in resent report emails now work correctly
Download endpoint no longer requires login (accessible from email links)
Better send confirmation: green checkmark + longer visible toast
Optimized for Apple Silicon only — removed Intel/x86 fallback code
Removed nodemailer dependency — all emails via msmtp
Simplified HandBrake encoder detection for native VideoToolbox
Cleaned up PATH variables (removed /usr/local/bin)
Fix resend email not arriving
Prevent duplicate JSON reports on resend
Improved error handling for email sending
Separate email schedule: send report at a different time than conversion

Resend report emails from the Reports page
Styled resend modal with animation
Reconstruct download links for old reports without mp4_path

Download links in email reports (via server URL)
Server URL setting in Settings for external download links
Secure download endpoint with path validation and range request support
Rate limiting on login: 5 attempts/min, 5 minute lockout
Brute force protection per IP address

Logout button in sidebar
